summary: Options Menu | Navigating to Games tab
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Options Menu
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates to the "Games" tab
steps.result: THEN the user will hear: “Games, <x> of <y> Options, press down to navigate games, Press up for player controls, Press <appropriate_directions> for more options, Press back to dismiss controls”
